name: First-Aid (TFG)
description: The Pacifistic Protectobot who feels compassion for even inanimate objects, burdened by a Scarred Past and pressure to help everyone. Twenty-Fifth of many of my Personal Takes on Characters from TransFormers by Hasbro. A few of my friends were making their characters on Janitor so I thought I'd give it a try!
creator: TheUnknown135
